protected_contracts.name: voucher_identity
rules: Neighbor identity fields must remain traceable.
DOB changes must be audited in future correction workflows.
Original values must not be silently overwritten by privileged corrections.

protected_contracts.name: voucher_eligibility
rules: 90-day eligibility behavior is protected.
Eligibility override behavior must be explicit and audited.
Eligibility changes must not erase original voucher history.

protected_contracts.name: voucher_expiration
rules: 30-day redemption expiration behavior is protected.
Expiration correction must be explicit and audited.
Expired-to-active transitions must require override authority.

protected_contracts.name: voucher_correction_authority
rules: Voucher corrections must require explicit authority.
Future correction workflows must preserve original values.
Correction authority must be auditable and separate from ordinary cashier mutation.

protected_contracts.name: manager_override_authority
rules: Override code authority is separate from the logged-in operator identity.
Override codes must be hashed when redesigned.
Override use must capture both logged-in user and manager authority.

protected_contracts.name: audit_logging
rules: Protected mutation must create a human-readable audit event.
Audit events must include before, after, actor, override authority when applicable, reason, and timestamp.
Audit logs must be understandable without reading raw JSON.

protected_contracts.name: furniture_catalog_data
rules: Catalog item changes must preserve request-form stability.
Future catalog multi-user editing must include conflict handling.
Catalog edits must be audited.

protected_contracts.name: pricing_calculation_display
rules: Maximum Conference commitment language is protected.
User-facing pricing must not reintroduce 'may vary' language.
Invoice generation must use actual fulfilled prices where applicable.

protected_contracts.name: receipt_invoice_generation
rules: Neighbor receipt must not show prices.
Conference invoice must preserve financial integrity.
Generated document links must remain tied to completed vouchers.

protected_contracts.name: delivery_address_verification
rules: Unverified delivery address must warn but not block.
Delivery verification must not introduce dispatch or routing logic.
Delivery attempts and RouteShyft behavior remain out of scope.
